follow_actions.instruction: Go to https://www.instagram.com/alittlenudge/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 1 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/damonahoffman/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 1 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/sweet2elite/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 1 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/meetpeopleinreallife/. Click on recent posts. For each post, like it, then visit the creator's profile. If they have under 10K followers and posted in the last 7 days, follow them. Do 2 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/datingadvice/. Click on recent posts. For each post, like it, then visit the creator's profile. If they have under 10K followers and posted in the last 7 days, follow them. Do 2 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each.
